data.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Align Tech Through 6 Analysts
Evaluating SiteOne Landscape Supply: Insights From 5 Financial Analysts
Domino's Reports Mixed Q3, Scales Back Growth Expectations For 2024 As Economic Headwinds Bite
data.description: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) reports third-quarter results with sales growth of 5.1% year-over-year, missing analyst estimates. Company's gross margin, operating margin, and earnings per share increased, while operating cash flow and dividend also saw positive growth. Guidance projects continued growth in sales and income for the next few years.

data.title: India's Philanthropy Titan Ratan Tata, Who Once Moved Starbucks Founder Howard Schultz To Tears, Passes Away At 86: 'Man With So Much Grace'
data.description: Renowned philanthropist and former chairman of Tata Group, Ratan Tata, passed away at the age of 86 on Oct. 9. Tata was admitted to Mumbai's Breach Candy hospital in a critical condition where he breathed his last.
